case_title: LEON BLOOMBERG CO & AN INDIVIDUAL VS MCDONALD, BOB DBA MANOR HOUSE ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEON BLOOMBERG CO & AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCDONALD, BOB DBA MANOR HOUSE ASSOCIATES $3,584.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,584.00, DEFT IS TO PAY IN FULL BY CHECK #107, FORTHWITH. IF CHECK NOT HONORED PLAINTIFF CAN REFILE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
